center.name: 巴爾薩斯河
center.summary: 巴爾薩斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括金冠翠蜂鸟、Happy wren、Striped sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in the southern Sierra Madre Oriental, the Balsas River watershed, and the Sierra Madre del Sur

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-crowned emerald is found in western Mexico from Sinaloa south to eastern Oaxaca and also inland up the Balsas River basin to southern Morelos
